Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono seems to have stepped out...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16014 0 0}The main ingredients are... d-glucose, erythritol, saccharin sodium...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}I ordered a bag of sand through the mail the other day, and it came with this supplement.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}It says here that this will "boost your brain power." I don't know how they could make such an outlandish claim with these ingredients.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}See for yourself. The active ingredients in this are all sweeteners.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}At the very end, it lists an omega-3 fatty acid called DHA, but that means there's only trace amounts of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}I know it was free, but what a joke. Maybe I'm in the wrong line of work...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 16022 0 0}Go ahead and take it if you want it, though the best it'll do is be a placebo.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}The food they serve at Wakatsu has better benefits than that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's made with loads of fish eyes, a prime source of DHA![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 1582 0 -1 -1 0 0}Speaking of DHA, did you know the full term is docosahexaenoic acid? You see, it's...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mr. Ono doesn't seem to be returning.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to give up for today.[n]{f 1 1}
